title: Shut It, Keith!
objective: Survive a 3-minute set by silencing Keith's neon chatter: tap every word-orb he spits out before it vanishes or reaches the SHUT bar, build combos, and chase a leaderboard score.

controls.outcome: The orb bursts, the SHUT bar cools, and your combo increases.
Stops a dangerous fast orb worth bonus points.

controls.input: Tap and hold the SHUT button when charged
controls.outcome: Briefly freezes all active orbs for cleanup.

steps: Keith stands center stage and telegraphs each spit pattern with a mouth glow and lane highlight 0.5 seconds before launch.
Neon word-orbs arc toward the SHUT bar at the bottom; tap them before they fade out or cross the bar.
Every clean hit adds score and combo; every 10-hit combo raises the multiplier by 1x up to 5x.
Missing 3 orbs, letting the SHUT bar fill completely, or tapping a fake decoy orb ends the run.
Every 30 seconds Keith gets louder: more lanes activate, orb speed rises, and red rush orbs appear more often.
A looping synth beat speeds up with the round, with sharp pop sounds for hits, a record-scratch miss cue, and a crowd cheer on combo tiers.
scoring: Score 100 points per normal orb, 250 per red rush orb, and apply the current combo multiplier. End-of-run score goes to a simple top-10 leaderboard stored locally offline and synced later if online.
tips: Watch Keith's mouth color: blue means wide spread, orange means straight rush, red means a fast danger orb.
Protect your combo first; missing is worse than skipping a low-value edge orb.
Save the mute pulse for overlapping red rush waves after the 90-second mark.
